scores.correctness_notes: Comprehensive and accurate. Covers collect_unit_status, collect_app_status, add_status(), priority order, and when it fires. Correctly notes leader-only for app status.
scores.hallucination_notes: Priority order listed as 'error > blocked > waiting > maintenance > active' but gold standard says 'error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active'. The maintenance/waiting ordering is inverted, which is a minor factual inaccuracy.
